rule_description: Use only signal snapshot values known at snapshot_date.
Do not recompute historical signal snapshots using current formulas.
Do not use outcome prices before planned_outcome_date.
Do not use future event information not known at snapshot_date.
Do not use post-snapshot ranking changes.
Do not use backfilled history unless tagged with availability timestamp.
Separate calendar-only event score from hard-lock advisory overlay.
Keep shadow tracker separate from production tracker.
Require signal_snapshot_id or forward_tracker_link_key for high-confidence matching.
Require multi-horizon sample maturity before effect claims.
